message.content:
Write 2 React slide components for an AI Agent lecture. Each is a separate .tsx file.

## DESIGN SYSTEM
`{ isActive: boolean }`, `React.memo`, `useGSAP` from `@gsap/react`.
CSS Variables: `--primary`(blue), `--secondary`(cyan), `--accent`(orange), `--bg-primary`, `--bg-secondary`, `--bg-accent`, `--text-primary`, `--text-secondary`, `--text-light`, `--border`, `--success`, `--card-bg`
Tailwind: `text-display-xl`, `text-h1`, `text-h2`, `text-h3`, `text-body`, `text-body-sm`, `text-caption`, `text-data`, `text-data-sm`, `shadow-card`
Components: `ComparisonTable` from `@/components/ComparisonTable`, `ExpandableSection` from `@/components/ExpandableSection`, `Badge` from `@/components/Badge`
**recharts is installed** — import from 'recharts': RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, Radar, ResponsiveContainer, Legend, Tooltip, BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid

---

## SLIDE 12 — 产品对比（雷达图 + 对比表）
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide12_Comparison.tsx`

**Concept**: Visual product comparison with recharts RadarChart and key differentiators.

### Title: "三Agent横向对比" with subtitle "OpenClaw vs Hermes Agent vs Claude Code"

### Top half: recharts RadarChart
Create a radar chart comparing 3 products on 6 dimensions:
- Dimensions: 生态丰富度, 安全性, 成本优势, 易用性, 平台覆盖, 自托管能力
- OpenClaw: [95, 70, 95, 80, 95, 100] (accent color)
- Hermes Agent: [40, 95, 60, 75, 30, 0] (secondary color)  
- Claude Code: [60, 90, 30, 70, 20, 0] (primary color)

Use ResponsiveContainer, RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, Radar, Legend, Tooltip.
Colors: OpenClaw=#FF6B35, Hermes=#00B4D8, Claude=#0066CC

### Bottom half: Key comparison highlights (3 cards side by side)

**OpenClaw 卡片** (orange accent):
- ✅ 278K Stars, 13,729 Skills, 24+平台
- ✅ 自托管、模型自由、成本可控
- ⚠️ 安全事件(ClawHavoc), 质量参差

**Hermes Agent 卡片** (cyan accent):
- ✅ GEPA自进化(40%性能提升), 零CVE, 173倍检索加速
- ✅ 三层记忆系统
- ⚠️ 仅118 Skills, 6平台

**Claude Code 卡片** (blue accent):
- ✅ SWE-bench 87.6%(世界第一), SOC 2认证
- ✅ 深度IDE集成
- ⚠️ 只会编程, 无消息平台, $200+/月

### Bottom takeaway:
"选型口诀：要广度选OpenClaw，要自进化选Hermes，要编程选Claude Code"

### ExpandableSection: "其他AI产品速览" — Coze(字节办公全家桶), Dify(可视化Agent平台), n8n(工作流自动化), Manus(通用Agent,被Meta收购)

---

## SLIDE 13 — 能力边界与降温
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide13_Limitations.tsx`

**Concept**: Honest assessment of what Agent CAN'T do. "降温" — set realistic expectations.

### Title: "理性看待Agent" with subtitle "它很强，但不是万能的"

### Layout: Two sections

**Section 1: "✅ Agent擅长的" (with green accent)**
5 items in a compact grid:
1. 📊 信息处理 — 文档总结、知识问答、数据检索
2. ✍️ 内容生成 — 报告撰写、邮件起草、代码生成
3. 🌐 系统操作 — 浏览器自动化、API调用、跨系统
4. 📈 数据分析 — 提取、清洗、可视化
5. ⚙️ 流程自动化 — 定时任务、编排、审批流转

**Section 2: "❌ Agent做不好的" (with red/orange accent)**
4 items with warning styling:
1. 🔢 精确数学计算 — 大模型本质是概率模型，不是计算器
2. 🌍 物理世界操作 — 无法直接操控硬件设备
3. 🎨 创造性判断 — 战略决策、艺术审美需要人类
4. ⚖️ 授权决策 — 涉及人事、财务等需要人类审批

### Middle: Large visual divider with alert icon
"Agent = 超级助手，不是超级英雄"

### Section 3: Key limitations specific to current technology
- 幻觉问题：模型会"一本正经地胡说八道"
- 安全风险：ClawHavce事件（135,000+设备受影响）
- 质量参差：OpenClaw超50% Skills为低质量/重复
- 成本陷阱：重度使用Claude API可达$800-1200/月

### Bottom: "保持敬畏，理性使用"
ExpandableSection: "如何降低Agent的风险？" — 最小权限原则、审计日志、人工审核...

---

IMPORTANT: Write both files using the Write tool. Include the recharts RadarChart in Slide12 with proper imports. Chinese text. Rich and colorful.

attachment.content:
- glm-plan-usage:usage-query: Query the usage information for the current account
- glm-plan-bug:case-feedback: Submit case feedback to report issues or suggestions for the current conversation
- glm-plan-usage:usage-query-skill: Run the usage query script to retrieve account usage information for GLM Coding Plan. Only use when invoked by usage-query-agent.
- glm-plan-bug:case-feedback-skill: Run the case feedback script to submit feedback for the current conversation. Only use when invoked by case-feedback-agent.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

6 import ExpandableSection from '@/components/ExpandableSection'; 7 import Badge from '@/components/Badge'; 8 9 interface SlideProps { 10 isActive: boolean; 11 } 12 13 const columns: ComparisonColumn[] = [ 14 { key: 'openclaw', header: 'OpenClaw', featured: true }, 15 { key: 'hermes', header: 'Hermes Agent' }, 16 { key: 'claude', header: 'Claude Code' }, 17 ]; 18 19 const rows: ComparisonRow[] = [ 20 { 21 feature: '定位', 22 values: { 23 openclaw: '通用AI操作系统', 24 hermes: '自进化数字助手', 25 claude: '专业编程Agent', 26 }, 27 }, 28 { 29 feature: '开源', 30 values: { 31 openclaw: true, 32 hermes: false, 33 claude: false, 34 }, 35 }, 36 { 37 feature: 'Skills数量', 38 values: { 39 openclaw: '13,729', 40 hermes: '118', 41 claude: '专业领域', 42 }, 43 highlight: 'openclaw', 44 }, 45 { 46 feature: '平台覆盖', 47 values: { 48 openclaw: '24+', 49 hermes: '6', 50 claude: 'IDE(8平台)', 51 }, 52 highlight: 'openclaw', 53 }, 54 { 55 feature: '自托管', 56 values: { 57 openclaw: true, 58 hermes: false, 59 claude: false, 60 }, 61 }, 62 { 63 feature: '安全认证', 64 values: { 65 openclaw: '社区审计', 66 hermes: '零CVE', 67 claude: 'SOC 2 Type II', 68 }, 69 }, 70 { 71 feature: '核心优势', 72 values: { 73 openclaw: '模型自由 + 渠道广', 74 hermes: 'GEPA自进化', 75 claude: 'SWE-bench 87.6%', 76 }, 77 }, 78 { 79 feature: '价格', 80 values: { 81 openclaw: 'DeepSeek 1/21', 82 hermes: '订阅制', 83 claude: '$200+/月', 84 }, 85 }, 86 ]; 87 88 const Slide10_Comparison: React.FC = ({ isActive }) => { 89 const containerRef = useRef(null); 90 91 useGSAP( 92 () => { 93 if (!isActive || !containerRef.current) return; 94 95 const ctx = gsap.context(() => { 96 const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.15 }); 97 98 tl.fromTo( 99 '.s10-title', 100 { opacity: 0, y: 30 }, 101 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power3.out' } 102 ); 103 104 tl.fromTo( 105 '.s10-subtitle', 106 { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, 107 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power3.out' }, 108 '-=0.3' 109 ); 110 111 tl.fromTo( 112 '.s10-table', 113 { opacity: 0, y: 40, scale: 0.97 }, 114 { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: 'power3.out' }, 115 '-=0.2' 116 ); 117 118 tl.fromTo( 119 '.s10-takeaway', 120 { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, 121 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power3.out' }, 122 '-=0.2' 123 ); 124 125 tl.fromTo( 126 '.s10-expand', 127 { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, 128 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power3.out' }, 129 '-=0.2' 130 ); 131 }, containerRef); 132 133 return () => ctx.revert(); 134 }, 135 { scope: containerRef, dependencies: [isActive] } 136 ); 137 138 return ( 139

1 import React, { useRef, memo } from 'react'; 2 import gsap from 'gsap'; 3 import { useGSAP } from '@gsap/react'; 4 import { 5 Database, 6 FileText, 7 Globe, 8 BarChart3, 9 Workflow, 10 AlertTriangle, 11 Calculator, 12 Cpu, 13 Lightbulb, 14 ShieldCheck, 15 } from 'lucide-react'; 16 import FeatureCard from '@/components/FeatureCard'; 17 import Badge from '@/components/Badge'; 18 19 interface SlideProps { 20 isActive: boolean; 21 } 22 23 const strengths = [ 24 { 25 icon: Database, 26 title: '信息处理', 27 description: 'RAG检索、文档总结、知识问答，快速从海量数据中提取关键信息', 28 emoji: '📊', 29 }, 30 { 31 icon: FileText, 32 title: '内容生成', 33 description: '报告撰写、邮件起草、代码生成，基于上下文的高质量内容输出', 34 emoji: '✍️', 35 }, 36 { 37 icon: Globe, 38 title: '系统操作', 39 description: '浏览器自动化、API调用、跨系统操作，打通信息孤岛', 40 emoji: '🌐', 41 }, 42 { 43 icon: BarChart3, 44 title: '数据分析', 45 description: '数据提取、清洗、可视化，将原始数据转化为可操作洞察', 46 emoji: '📈', 47 }, 48 { 49 icon: Workflow, 50 title: '流程自动化', 51 description: '定时任务、跨系统编排、审批流转，解放重复性劳动', 52 emoji: '⚙️', 53 }, 54 ]; 55 56 const limitations = [ 57 { 58 icon: Calculator, 59 title: '精确数学计算', 60 description: '大模型本质是概率模型，复杂运算需调用外部工具', 61 }, 62 { 63 icon: Cpu, 64 title: '物理世界操作', 65 description: '无法直接操控硬件设备，需要物联网中间层', 66 }, 67 { 68 icon: Lightbulb, 69 title: '创造性判断', 70 description: '艺术审美、战略决策等高阶认知仍需人类主导', 71 }, 72 { 73 icon: ShieldCheck, 74 title: '授权决策', 75 description: '涉及人事、财务等敏感领域必须由人类审批', 76 }, 77 ]; 78 79 const Slide11_Capabilities: React.FC = ({ isActive }) => { 80 const containerRef = useRef(null); 81 82 useGSAP( 83 () => { 84 if (!isActive || !containerRef.current) return; 85 86 const ctx = gsap.context(() => { 87 const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.15 }); 88 89 // Title 90 tl.fromTo( 91 '.s11-title', 92 { opacity: 0, y: 30 }, 93 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power3.out' } 94 ); 95 96 tl.fromTo( 97 '.s11-subtitle', 98 { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, 99 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power3.out' }, 100 '-=0.3' 101 ); 102 103 // Strength section label 104 tl.fromTo( 105 '.s11-strength-label', 106 { opacity: 0, x: -20 }, 107 { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power3.out' }, 108 '-=0.2' 109 ); 110 111 // Strength cards - staggered grid entrance 112 tl.fromTo( 113 '.s11-strength-card', 114 { opacity: 0, y: 30, scale: 0.95 }, 115 { 116 opacity: 1, 117 y: 0, 118 scale: 1, 119 duration: 0.5, 120 stagger: 0.1, 121 ease: 'back.out(1.4)', 122 }, 123 '-=0.1' 124 ); 125 126 // Divider 127 tl.fromTo( 128 '.s11-divider', 129 { scaleX: 0 }, 130 { scaleX: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power3.out' }, 131 '-=0.2' 132 ); 133 134 // Limitation section label 135 tl.fromTo( 136 '.s11-limit-label', 137 { opacity: 0, x: -20 }, 138 { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power3.out' }, 139 '-=0.2' 140 ); 141 142 // Limitation cards 143 tl.fromTo( 144 '.s11-limit-card', 145 { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, 146 { 147 opacity: 1, 148 y: 0, 149 duration: 0.4, 150 stagger: 0.08, 151 ease: 'power3.out', 152 }, 153 '-=0.1' 154 );
